notes: Bedford MA (Middlesex) — MAPC layer 2 (strip ^23). Parcels carry generic assessor codes (IND/COM/A/B/C) so a spatial rebind is required. MAPC codes map to the CURRENT bylaw (adopted March 25 2025, bedfordma.gov View/2818): IP=Industrial Park A (bylaw 'Industrial A'), I=Industrial (B), IC=Industrial (C), C=Commercial, GB/LB=Great Road business (Table 4.3-2), R/R-A/R-B/R-C/R-D=Residence. Vocab-vs-bylaw check via gate-a.
